overview.zh: 棒型浮选机是一种新型高效的矿物浮选设备，采用特殊设计的棒状搅拌器，结合优化的气泡生成系统，实现了矿浆与空气的充分混合。该设备适用于各类金属矿物和非金属矿物的浮选分离，具有矿化率高、泡沫稳定、选择性好等特点，在提高精矿品位和回收率方面表现出色。
overview.en: The Bar Flotation Machine is a new type of efficient mineral flotation equipment, adopting specially designed bar-shaped stirrers combined with an optimized bubble generation system to achieve thorough mixing of slurry and air. This equipment is suitable for flotation separation of various metallic and non-metallic minerals, featuring high mineralization rate, stable froth, and good selectivity. It performs excellently in improving concentrate grade and recovery rate.

note.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
note.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

zh: 独特的棒状搅拌器设计，提高了矿浆与空气的混合效率
改进的充气系统，产生更均匀的气泡分布
特殊的流体动力学设计，减少湍流干扰，提高浮选稳定性
可调节的搅拌速度和充气量，适应不同矿物特性
结构坚固耐用，维护简便，使用寿命长
能耗低，处理量大，经济效益显著
en: Unique bar-shaped stirrer design improves the mixing efficiency of slurry and air
Improved aeration system produces more uniform bubble distribution
Special fluid dynamics design reduces turbulence interference and improves flotation stability
Adjustable stirring speed and air volume to adapt to different mineral characteristics
Sturdy and durable structure, easy maintenance, long service life
Low energy consumption, large processing capacity, significant economic benefits

description.zh: 适用于铜、铅、锌、金、银等贵重金属和有色金属的浮选
description.en: Suitable for flotation of copper, lead, zinc, gold, silver and other precious and non-ferrous metals

description.zh: 可用于铁、锰等黑色金属矿物的反浮选工艺
description.en: Can be used for reverse flotation processes of ferrous metal minerals such as iron and manganese

description.zh: 适合石墨、萤石、长石、石英等非金属矿物的浮选提纯
description.en: Suitable for flotation purification of non-metallic minerals such as graphite, fluorite, feldspar, and quartz

description.zh: 特别适合细粒和超细粒矿物的浮选，提高回收率
description.en: Especially suitable for flotation of fine and ultrafine particles, improving recovery rate
